message: 30 mins into this promotional campaign and its already proving to be a great success
I'm seeing a lot of sales coming in
It was definitely a great idea offering a free tote for every $50 spent
People love free stuff
Sales are definitely looking good team. If we keep this up Ill treat the whole team to dinner next friday
In that case Im going to have my eyes glued to the monitoring services to make sure there are no hiccups
Yeah guys. Just be vigilant. Because theres such a high volume of sales something could easily go wrong
Remember everyone if theres anything unusual raise the flag immediately. Heres to a hitch-free sale!
Clicked Start button
Team we have a situation. Customers are reporting they arent receiving confirmation emails.
That is not good
I knew things were too good to be true
We need to get those emails sent out as quickly as possible
Im checking our email service logs now. Hold on...
And Ill check to see if the problem is platform related
As well as impacting our sales this will impact the trust customers have in us. Lets get this incident fixed ASAP
@Damian Heymann please guide us through the next steps. We need to act fast and resolve this.
Bob are customers across the globe reporting the issue or is it localized ? how many calls so far ?
Checking the reports
we are receiving calls thru out - It must be global
Daniel is the email service hosted by us ?
So far 300+ calls
Hi Damian  yeah we have Email service app
Daniel i see a change for the email service in PROD CHG89352
i am looking the logs
could it be the root cause ?
That was a minor change - but i can roll back if you want - But timing of change and error aren't matching
*Incident Number INC100095:* clients are not receiving confirmation emails P1
Update
Clients are not receiving confirmation emails around 300 calls reported so far email service logs and recent PROD changes being checked
I see i dont see email confirmation when i place the order
if the timings don't match don't roll back what else could potentially caus the issue ?
Daniel Tanya can we please engage Amazon ? the error suggests a problem with their SES service
Customers have only started reporting issues (with not receiving emails) 30 mins after the sale began
So it didn’t affect our sales just the confirmation email wasn’t received? And that’s why a P1 was raised?
Sure i will check - but do we know what's the issue ?
If issues started 30 mins after the sale went live and sales are at unprecedented high - with new emails now being rejected... could this be a bottleneck issue?
botocore.exceptions.EndpointConnectionError: Could not connect to the endpoint URL: "<https://email.us-west-2.amazonaws.com>
Looking at that log message I'm thinking the daily sending quota has been exceeded leading Amazon SES (who manage our email sending service) to regulate and restrict them
can we contact Amazon and increase the limit ?
Should we not revert to our backup email provider
Proficient Cloud Services is our Managed Service Provider (MSP) for AWS. Whenever we've faced issues or needed service changes with AWS in the past we've routed our communications through them
Daniel Tanya - would it be quicker to use the legacy email system or contact Amazon ?
Change over will be much quicker
its been so long since we used that backup provider i don’t even know if its a visable option right now?  Its a quicker option that we can try not sure tbh.
I’ll leave with the IM to decide.  Lets just decide.
Apologies should mostl ikely be a P2 but considering the number of calls i may have gone a little too high
did we have similar limits with the legacy provider ?
No we didn't
if so we'd end up in the same situation shirtly ...
I think the limit is due to high sale- But legacy is our own system
oh ok in that case lets try the legacy system
I suggest we let customers know we're aware of the issue and are working to fix it as soon as possible.
Ok switching over to backup provider its just a property change and a restart.  Give me a few mins…
in the meantime Tanya would you be able to reach out to Amazon and change the thresholds so we don't end up in the same situation in the future  with them ?\\
Sure i am on call with them
thanks
the issue was caused by limits within the Amazon SES email service

ERROR [NupBackupServiceClient] - Authentication failed: API keys for NupBackupService are expired.
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "nup_backup_service.py" line 35 in <module>
    client.call_backup_service()
  File "nup_backup_service.py" line 22 in call_backup_service
    raise NupBackupServiceAuthException()
main.NupBackupServiceAuthException: Authentication failed: API keys for NupBackupService are expired.
AWS Support Case ID: 271928921403
Looks like our API keys to our backup email provider has expired.  Ok we need to go to plan B.  Let me revert back and lets reach out to the  ‘Proficient Cloud Services' team.
we're failing over to a legacy email solution while Tanya is reaching out to Amazon to change the usage limits for future use
Tanya how long will it take to change the limits ?
ETA is 60 to 90 minutes
Daniel how quickly can we get the API keys renewed ?
We dont have it handy - we will work with admin team

Hamed S would you be able to help ? the primary email service reached it's usage limit which we're trying to change with Amazon the old email service isn't working due to expired API keys both solutions would take a significant time it seems anything else we can do ?
Yes @Tinus  can you call your direct contact please?
That is to long it should be a simple reconfiguration let me ring my contact
I am on call with them - They should be updating config anytime to increase quota
Looks like emails are going through now
Well done everyone!
Update : using the legacy system is not possible we're escalating with Amazon to increase the usage limits on their SES service
Are we sure its fixed?
Looks like it to me - logs for email service now look healthy
@Damian Heymann what do you think?
Thanks for update
i'm looking at confirmations per minute and the numbers are going up
yes looks like we're good again
I received all my pending emails as well
Bob please check with the impacted clients
Yes it's positive
the calls have reduced - and emails are out
Daniel will emails unsent while the SES service was down be sent automatically or do we need to retrigger them manually ?
It's FIFO - They should automatically trigger
Who knew free totes could cause such havoc?
Definitely not me
@Damian Heymann Good job saving the day - looks like friday dinner is back on!
limits changed emails are going out again Bob confirmed the call volumes have dropped
Clicked Start_feedback button\n
